km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: William Thorpe於1494年出生在英國。他和Margaret Porter至少有1個女兒。他去世於1575年享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Thorpe于1494年出生在英国。他和Margaret Porter至少有1个女儿。他去世于1575年享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): from Middle English thorp(e) ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English thorp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from any of several places called Thorp(e), which are most frequent in Yorkshire, the Midlands, and East Anglia. Compare Throop .

variants.name: Trupp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Hermann, Reinhold.

English (Herefordshire and Monmouthshire): variant of   Thorpe  , or from a place so named, such as Thrupp (Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire), Thrupe (Somerset), Throop (Dorset, Hampshire, Somerset), and Throope (Wiltshire).

variants.name: Throop
meanings: English: from Middle English throp ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English throp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from Throop in Hampshire, Throope in Wiltshire, Thrup in Oxfordshire, or any of the places called Thrupp in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, and Northamptonshire. Compare Thorpe .

variants.name: Tharpe
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Thorpe  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thorp
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Thorpe  .

variants.name: Troup
meanings: Scottish (eastern): habitational name from a place in the parish of Gamrie, near Banff. The placename is unexplained, perhaps a Pictish cognate of Welsh trwp ‘vessel, dish, basin’.
Possibly also English, a metathesized form of   Thorpe  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: William Thorpe was born in 1494, in England. He had at least 1 daughter with Margaret Porter. He died in 1575, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: William Thorpe est né en 1494, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Margaret Porter. Il est décédé en 1575, à l’âge de 81 ans.

it.lifeSummary: William Thorpe è nato il nel 1494 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Margaret Porter. Morì nel 1575, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Thorpeは1494年にイギリスで生まれた。彼はMargaret Porterとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1575年に81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Thorpe(은)는 1494년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 Margaret Porter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1575년 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: William Thorpe родился в 1494 г. в местности Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Margaret Porter. Он умер в 1575 г. в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: William Thorpe nació en 1494, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Margaret Porter. Murió en 1575, a la edad de 81 años.
